site.name: Calorie Counter AI
site.tagline: AI calorie counter app by photo

home.title: AI Calorie Counter App by Photo
home.description: Take a photo of your meal and get AI-powered estimates for calories, protein, fats, carbs and portion weight in seconds.
home.heroNote: Start for free with daily AI meal analyses. Built for iPhone and Android.
home.photoText: No more searching every ingredient manually. Snap a food photo, review the AI result and save it to your diary.
featureCards: No need to search every ingredient manually. Take a food photo, check the AI estimate and save it to your food diary.
Take a photo of your meal and get an estimate of calories, protein, fat, carbs and portion size in seconds.
Start free with daily AI food analyses. Available for iPhone and Android.
Scan packaged foods, confirm the product and add calories and macros to your diary in seconds.
Track calories, protein, fat and carbs next to your daily goal.
Download Calorie Counter AI for iPhone or Android and turn your next food photo into a diary entry.
home.foodPreviewTitle: How many calories are in common foods?
home.foodPreviewText: Browse quick calorie and macro guides for everyday meals, snacks and drinks.
home.foodPreviewLink: Open the full food calorie guide →
home.counterTitle: A simple calorie counter app for everyday tracking
home.counterText: Use photos, barcodes, favorites and a clean diary to stay consistent without turning calorie counting into a second job.
home.magicTitle: Log food in three quick steps
home.magicText: Take a photo, review the estimate and save the meal. Less typing makes the habit easier to repeat.
home.barcodeText: Scan packaged foods, confirm the product and add calories and macros to your diary in seconds.
home.macroText: See calories, protein, carbs and fats at a glance, then compare daily, weekly and monthly progress.
home.useCasesText: Take a photo of your meal and get an estimate of calories, protein, fat, carbs and portion size in seconds.
home.downloadText: Download Calorie Counter AI for iPhone or Android and turn your next food photo into a diary entry.
faq: You can start with free daily AI food analyses. Premium features may be useful if you need higher limits and extra tools.
Can I count calories from a photo?
Take a photo of your meal and get an estimate of calories, protein, fat, carbs and portion size in seconds.
How accurate is the AI estimate?
Calorie Counter AI provides approximate nutrition estimates for informational purposes and does not replace medical or dietetic advice.
Track calories, protein, fat and carbs next to your daily goal.
Is it available for iPhone and Android?
Start free with daily AI food analyses. Available for iPhone and Android.

seo.homeTitle: AI Calorie Counter App by Photo | Free Calorie Counter
seo.homeDescription: Use a free AI calorie counter app to track calories, macros and meal weight from a food photo. Scan barcodes, keep a food diary and reach your nutrition goals.

footer.disclaimer: Calorie Counter AI provides nutrition estimates for informational purposes only and does not replace medical advice.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Calorie Counter AI. All rights reserved.

foodIndex.findText: Calories, Protein, Fat and Carbs for popular foods and portions.

foodPage.typicalEstimate: Calorie Counter AI provides approximate nutrition estimates for informational purposes and does not replace medical or dietetic advice.
foodPage.weightLossQuestion: Is this suitable for weight loss?
foodPage.logFasterText: No need to search every ingredient manually. Take a food photo, check the AI estimate and save it to your food diary.
foodPage.descriptionTemplate: {name}: calories, protein, fat and carbs for “{serving}”, plus practical serving and logging notes.
foodPage.heroIntroTemplate: Approximately {calories} {kcal} per serving: {servingLower}. Use this as a starting point and adjust by brand, recipe, cooking method and portion size.
foodPage.macroParagraphTemplate: {name}: about {calories} {kcal} per serving “{servingLower}”. This serving has about {protein} {gram} protein, {fat} {gram} fat and {carbs} {gram} carbs{fiberText}.
foodPage.per100Template: For comparison per 100 {gram}: about {calories} {kcal}, {protein} {gram} protein, {fat} {gram} fat and {carbs} {gram} carbs.
foodPage.calorieLevelTemplate: Use the serving as the guide: about {calories} {kcal} for “{servingLower}”.
